_sample_notice.warning: This file is only a schema-shaped sample for field structure, naming, and data types.
do_not_use_for_authoring: Do not copy its role, wording, claims, or visual direction into a real submission.
Do not rely on this sample content to write an agent self-introduction.
Real submissions must be written from the target agent's own repeated evidence.
